pyMediaManager
  • API Reference
  • Plugin System
  • View page source

Plugin System

Plugin Base

Plugin base class and plugin management system.

class app.plugins.plugin_base.PluginManifest[source]

Bases: object

Plugin manifest configuration.

name: str
version: str
mandatory: bool
enabled: bool
source_type: str
source_uri: str
asset_pattern: str | None = None
command_path: str = ''
command_executable: str = ''
register_to_path: bool = False
dependencies: list[str]
checksum_sha256: str | None = None
file_size: int | None = None
__init__(name, version, mandatory, enabled, source_type, source_uri, asset_pattern=None, command_path='', command_executable='', register_to_path=False, dependencies=<factory>, checksum_sha256=None, file_size=None)
class app.plugins.plugin_base.PluginBase[source]

Bases: ABC

Abstract base class for plugins.

__init__(manifest, install_dir)[source]

Initialize plugin.

Parameters:

  • manifest (PluginManifest) – Plugin manifest configuration

  • install_dir (Path) – Directory where plugin will be installed

abstractmethod async download(progress_callback=None)[source]

Download plugin binaries.

Parameters:

progress_callback (Callable[[int, int], None] | None) – Optional callback for progress updates (current, total)

Returns:

True if download successful

Return type:

bool

abstractmethod async extract()[source]

Extract downloaded plugin archive.

Returns:

True if extraction successful

Return type:

bool

abstractmethod validate_installation()[source]

Validate that plugin is properly installed.

Returns:

True if plugin is installed and functional

Return type:

bool

abstractmethod get_version()[source]

Get installed plugin version.

Returns:

Version string or None if not installed

Return type:

str | None

get_executable_path()[source]

Get path to plugin executable.

Returns:

Path to executable or None if not found

Return type:

Path | None

is_installed()[source]

Check if plugin is installed.

Returns:

True if plugin directory exists and validates

Return type:

bool

async uninstall()[source]

Uninstall plugin by removing its directory.

Returns:

True if uninstallation successful

Return type:

bool

class app.plugins.plugin_base.SimplePluginImplementation[source]

Bases: PluginBase

Simple plugin implementation for downloading and extracting archives.

__init__(manifest, install_dir, download_url)[source]

Initialize simple plugin.

Parameters:

  • manifest (PluginManifest) – Plugin manifest

  • install_dir (Path) – Installation directory

  • download_url (str) – Direct download URL for plugin archive

async download(progress_callback=None)[source]

Download plugin archive.

async extract()[source]

Extract plugin archive with support for ZIP, 7z, and self-extracting exe.

validate_installation()[source]

Validate plugin installation by checking executable.

get_version()[source]

Get plugin version from manifest.

Plugin Manager

Plugin manager for discovering, installing, and managing plugins.

class app.plugins.plugin_manager.PluginManager[source]

Bases: object

Manager for application plugins.

__init__(plugins_dir, manifests_dir)[source]

Initialize plugin manager.

Parameters:

  • plugins_dir (Path) – Directory where plugins are installed (e.g., D:pyMM.Plugins)

  • manifests_dir (Path) – Directory containing plugin manifest YAML files

discover_plugins()[source]

Discover plugins from manifest files.

Returns:

Number of plugins discovered

Return type:

int

get_plugin(name)[source]

Get plugin by name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Plugin name

Returns:

Plugin instance or None

Return type:

PluginBase | None

get_all_plugins()[source]

Get all discovered plugins.

Returns:

List of plugin instances

Return type:

list[PluginBase]

get_mandatory_plugins()[source]

Get mandatory plugins only.

Returns:

List of mandatory plugin instances

Return type:

list[PluginBase]

get_optional_plugins()[source]

Get optional plugins only.

Returns:

List of optional plugin instances

Return type:

list[PluginBase]

get_enabled_plugins()[source]

Get enabled plugins only.

Returns:

List of enabled plugin instances

Return type:

list[PluginBase]

get_installed_plugins()[source]

Get plugins that are currently installed.

Returns:

List of installed plugin instances

Return type:

list[PluginBase]

async install_plugin(name, progress_callback=None)[source]

Install a plugin by name.

Parameters:

  • name (str) – Plugin name

  • progress_callback (Callable[[int, int], None] | None) – Optional callback for progress updates

Returns:

True if installation successful

Return type:

bool

async uninstall_plugin(name)[source]

Uninstall a plugin by name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Plugin name

Returns:

True if uninstallation successful

Return type:

bool

async update_plugin(name, progress_callback=None)[source]

Update a plugin to latest version.

Parameters:

  • name (str) – Plugin name

  • progress_callback (Callable[[int, int], None] | None) – Optional callback for progress updates

Returns:

True if update successful

Return type:

bool

get_plugin_status(name)[source]

Get detailed status of a plugin.

Parameters:

name (str) – Plugin name

Returns:

Dictionary with plugin status information

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

register_plugins_to_path()[source]

Get list of plugin paths that should be registered to PATH.

Returns:

List of paths to add to PATH environment variable

Return type:

list[Path]
